title: Bilingual Translator Agent
shortDescription: Drafts client communications in the client's preferred language and translates incoming documents back into English for the matter file.

seo.title: AI Bilingual Translator Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Draft client communications in the client's preferred language and translate incoming documents back into English. The communication wall that doesn't have to slow the matter.

hero.headline: AI Bilingual Translator Agent
hero.subheadline: Drafts every client-facing communication in the client's preferred language and renders incoming documents back into English for the matter file. The translation work that used to add days to a matter happens in minutes, with attorney review at the gate.
bullets: Client-facing emails drafted in the client's preferred language
Incoming documents translated to English for the matter file
Plain-language explanations for legal concepts the client may not know
Translation provenance logged so verification is straightforward

scenario.heading: The translation lag you would have absorbed
paragraphs: A Spanish-speaking immigration client emails a 6-page document from a USCIS notice he received that morning. In the old workflow, you wait 2 days for the contracted translator to turn it around, then 2 more days to draft and translate the response. The Bilingual Translator renders the USCIS notice into English within an hour, drafts the response in Spanish for the attorney's review (with a side-by-side English version), and the client has a substantive answer the same day.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Bilingual Translator does
bullets: Drafts client-facing communications in the client's preferred language with attorney-review English alongside
Translates incoming client documents to English for the matter file
Adds plain-language explanations for legal concepts the client may not be familiar with
Logs translation provenance per document so a contracted translator can verify if needed

integrations: Practice management system for matter and client language preference
Document management system for translated document storage

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: Translations of incoming documents are flagged for review when the document is high-stakes (a court filing, an immigration notice, a settlement offer). For routine correspondence the attorney signs off; for high-stakes content the agent recommends a certified human translator and the engagement uses the AI version as the working draft, not the official record.

faq.question: What languages does this support?
faq.answer: The major US-practice languages out of the box (Spanish, Mandarin, Vietnamese, Korean, Russian, Tagalog, Arabic, Haitian Creole, Portuguese, French). For other languages, the Build phase confirms model coverage before the agent goes live.

faq.question: Does this replace our certified translator for court filings?
faq.answer: No. For documents that need certified translation for court use (foreign-language exhibits, sworn declarations), the agent produces the working draft to speed the certified translator's job. The certified translation remains the official record for filings that require one.
